dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The biting wind tore through my tattered robes, mirroring the gaping wound in my chest.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: Is this... the end? After all these years... still just a third-rate martial artist. A disposable pawn.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My vision blurred, the faces of my enemies, the Blood Sect assassins, fading into darkness. I had failed. Failed to protect anyone. Failed to become strong.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: If only... if only I had another chance...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP!

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: (Wakes up suddenly, disoriented) What...?

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: This isn't... the alleyway. This is my old room. The one in the sect's outer disciples' dormitory.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: My body... it feels so light. So... young.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He looked down at his hands. Uncalloused, unscarred. The hands of a fifteen-year-old boy.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: This can't be... Am I dreaming? A vivid nightmare?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHIMMER!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Welcome, Player. The 'Infinite Level Up System' has been activated.]

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: (Eyes widen) A system window? Just like the legends... No, this isn't a dream. This is real. I've regressed! I've returned to the past!

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The year... it's 20 years before the Blood Sect's rise. Before the war. Before my death.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: This is my chance. My second life. I won't waste it again. I won't be a weakling, a pawn to be discarded.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The memories... they're all here. Every technique I saw, every secret I overheard, every mistake I made.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The 'Infinite Level Up System'... what does it do?

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Player 'Jinmu' has received a 'Beginner's Package'. Do you wish to open it?]

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: (A slight smirk plays on his lips) A beginner's package? This is truly like a game. Good. I'll play this game to win.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: Open.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHING!

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Beginner's Package contents: 1x 'Basic Internal Energy Cultivation Manual (Rank F)', 5x 'Minor Health Potions', 100x 'Copper Coins'.]

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: Rank F? Pathetic. But a start. I remember this manual. It's what every outer disciple gets. Most never master it beyond the first few stages.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: But I'm not 'most'. I have two decades of experience, observations, and knowledge of advanced techniques that haven't even been invented yet.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The 'Basic Internal Energy Cultivation Manual'... The key isn't just to cultivate it, but to understand its flaws, its potential. I know a way to accelerate it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Jinmu's eyes, once dull and resigned, now burned with a fierce, calculating light.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: First, I need to get stronger. Much stronger. The sect's outer disciple training is a joke. I need to find a secluded spot.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The Hidden Bamboo Grove... it's rarely patrolled. Perfect.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK (door opening)

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: (Slips out of the dormitory, moving stealthily) I remember the path. Even after all these years. My old self would have been afraid of getting caught breaking curfew. Not anymore.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He moved with a newfound purpose, his steps light, his mind racing with plans.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The first thing is to cultivate the 'Basic Internal Energy'. But I won't just follow the instructions. I'll integrate the breathing techniques I learned from the 'Azure Dragon's Scale' manual, which won't be discovered for another five years.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: It's risky. Combining different cultivation methods can lead to Qi Deviation. But the reward... the acceleration will be immense.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He reached the Hidden Bamboo Grove, the moonlight filtering through the dense leaves.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: (Sits in a meditative pose) This is where it begins. My second chance. My path to becoming the strongest.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (gentle energy flow)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As he began to circulate his nascent internal energy, a subtle warmth spread through his meridians. It was familiar, yet different. This time, it felt... right.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Basic Internal Energy Cultivation (Rank F) has begun.]

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [Progress: 1%]

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: Good. Now, let's see how fast I can break through the first stage. The old me took months. This time... it will be days. Hours, even.

dialogue.speaker: Jinmu
dialogue.line: The future of Murim depends on it. My future depends on it.

summary: Jinmu, a weak martial artist, dies a pathetic death only to regress 20 years into the past, finding himself with a mysterious 'Infinite Level Up System' and a fierce determination to change his fate and become the strongest in Murim.
